<script>// Prevent scroll on any interaction with the iframe window.addEventListener('scroll', function(e) {  // Get the active element  const activeElement = document.activeElement;  // Check if an iframe has focus  if (activeElement && activeElement.tagName === 'IFRAME') {  e.preventDefault();  // Keep scroll position locked  window.scrollTo(window.scrollX, window.scrollY);  } }, true); // Alternative approach: Monitor scroll changes continuously let lastScrollY = window.scrollY; let isScrollingAllowed = true; setInterval(function() {  if (!isScrollingAllowed && window.scrollY !== lastScrollY) {  window.scrollTo(0, lastScrollY);  } }, 10); // Lock scroll when clicking on iframe document.getElementById('ceschedule').addEventListener('mouseenter', function() {  lastScrollY = window.scrollY;  isScrollingAllowed = false; }); // Unlock scroll when leaving iframe document.getElementById('ceschedule').addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {  isScrollingAllowed = true; });</script>
